0.20% per transaction
Waived
Where Enterprise wins on payments: Online standard consumer cards save 0.10% per transaction, Shop Pay Express saves 1.0% (domestic) and the 3rd-party gateway fee is fully waived. POS card-present rates, ACH, and premium card rates are identical between the two plans.

Platform Capabilities

Performance, APIs & Developer Access

Enterprise extends the platform with higher limits, dedicated infrastructure, and advanced developer capabilities built for larger scale operations.

What Plus and Enterprise share: Both plans include the full Shopify feature set — native B2B functionality, checkout extensibility, Shopify Payments, unlimited staff accounts, Flow automation, Launchpad, Markets, and access to the full app ecosystem. The differences above are additive — Enterprise builds on top of everything Plus already offers.

 — 99.95% SLA-backed

Enterprise — Key Differentiators

Four things only Enterprise delivers

Beyond the support and performance tiers, these four capabilities are the clearest separators between the two plans.

🧑‍💻

Technical Account Manager

A dedicated TAM who develops a deep understanding of Sitka Gear's technical stack, proactively surfaces best practices, owns quarterly health reviews, and is your first call during incidents — not a ticketing queue.

Enterprise Only
📄

Dedicated SLAs in Agreement

Enterprise is the only plan with contractual, SLA-backed availability guarantees — 99.9% uptime for both Checkout/Shop Pay and the Storefront API. Plus has no formal SLA written into the agreement.

Enterprise Only
🌐

Network Calls in Shopify Functions

Enterprise unlocks HTTP requests within Shopify Functions, enabling real-time calls to external APIs — powering dynamic pricing, live inventory lookups, custom discount logic, and more at checkout without workarounds.

Enterprise Only
⚡

Higher API Rate Limits

Enterprise doubles the Admin and Storefront API rate limits (20× vs 10× on Plus), and supports unthrottled Storefront API access — critical for high-volume integrations, real-time catalog sync, and custom headless builds.

Enterprise Only
Personalized Walkthrough

The Shopify Network

Premium Hunting Brands Choose Shopify

The most respected names in premium hunting apparel run on Shopify — including Sitka's closest competitors.

Direct Competitor
KUIU
Performance hunting apparel sold exclusively DTC — one of Sitka's most direct competitors in the premium backcountry hunting segment. Runs entirely on Shopify.
kuiu.com
Competitor
First Lite
Technical merino-based hunting apparel brand known for innovation in layering systems and conservation partnerships. Built on Shopify.
firstlite.com
Competitor
Stone Glacier
Ultra-premium backcountry hunting gear built for serious mountain hunters. Renowned for pack systems and technical outerwear. Built on Shopify.
stoneglacier.com
